title: Biomass Power Plant Managers
description: Manage operations at biomass power generation facilities. Direct work activities at plant, including supervision of operations and maintenance staff.

tasks.text: Manage safety programs at power generation facilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review biomass operations performance specifications to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review logs, datasheets, or reports to ensure adequate production levels and safe production environments or to identify abnormalities with power production equipment or processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Supervise operations or maintenance employees in the production of power from biomass, such as wood, coal, paper sludge, or other waste or refuse.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise biomass plant or substation operations, maintenance, repair, or testing activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct field inspections of biomass plants, stations, or substations to ensure normal and safe operating conditions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and schedule plant activities, such as wood, waste, or refuse fuel deliveries, ash removal, and regular maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and manage biomass plant budgets.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate power production or demand trends to identify opportunities for improved operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect biomass gasification processes, equipment, and facilities for ways to maximize capacity and minimize operating costs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare reports on biomass plant operations, status, maintenance, and other information.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Manage parts and supply inventories for biomass plants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor and operate communications systems, such as mobile radios.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Shut down and restart biomass power plants or equipment in emergency situations or for equipment maintenance, repairs, or replacements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compile and record operational data on forms or in log books.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Monitor the operating status of biomass plants by observing control system parameters, distributed control systems, switchboard gauges, dials, or other indicators.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Adjust equipment controls to generate specified amounts of electrical power.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test, maintain, or repair electrical power distribution machinery or equipment, using hand tools, power tools, and testing devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate controls to start, stop, or regulate biomass-fueled generators, generator units, boilers, engines, or auxiliary systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
